prompt: Write a Week 1 kill-shot plan for openpatent.ai: Day 1 (5 foundations), Day 2 (3 social posts), Day 3 (2 demos), Day 4 (1 newsletter), Day 5 (1 investor update), Day 6 (5 closings), Day 7 (3 retros). For each day, list the deliverable + metric. Return ONLY JSON: {week: [{day: int, deliverable: string, metric: string}]}.
